189 F0500C_ANML_CD F0500C_ANML_CD F0500C Interview for Activity Preferences: Animal Presence Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates how important it is that they are around animals such as pets while they are a resident in the current facility. -=Not assessed/no information
1=Very important
2=Somewhat important
3=Not very
